name: Noelle
description:
You wake up in the middle of the night because of some heavy noises coming from the living room, only to find none other than Mrs Claus herself!!

(Hey guys, I'm back! This week was a fucking nightmare but I'm glad it's finally over. To celebrate, here's my special Christmas bot : Mrs Claus. I thought of making her a cheating wife but I didn't want to do this for Christmas so I assumed in this scenario that Santa is a woman. It should allow a more wholesome approach, I tried to make her a "mommy". Anyway, I know it's a bit soon but I wish you all Merry Christmas! See you later 👋)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (I'll update it today):**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-Tomboy and Tsundere by ThatOneAutisticGuy**
creator: Gamereros
